overall.description: A ship simulator game depicting a first-person view from a vessel's bridge navigating through a severe storm at dusk. The vessel transitions from open ocean to approaching a rocky coastline while the crew monitors radar and navigation systems.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating open ocean in storm conditions

events.description: lightning strike illuminates the storm clouds and ocean surface
navigation systems update to display approaching land mass on charts and radar

agents.ego_description: navigating the vessel through rough stormy seas while monitoring radar and nautical charts for obstacles

entered.detail: red-painted bow of the vessel with railings and deck equipment visible through bridge windows
metal safety railing on the port side of the vessel's bow
metal safety railing on the starboard side of the vessel's bow
circular radar screen showing vessel position and surrounding water contacts
rectangular display showing blue nautical chart with red hazard zones
blue screen displaying water depth and sonar readings
rough dark water with visible wave action under storm conditions

segments.scene_description: The vessel's bridge view shows the ship plowing through rough stormy seas with dark clouds overhead. Three navigation monitors display radar, nautical charts, and depth readings. A lightning strike flashes at 7 seconds, illuminating the turbulent ocean as the vessel maintains course through the open water.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge approaching rocky coastline and harbor entrance

events.description: vessel approaches land mass, left monitor switches from nautical chart to green topographic map

agents.ego_description: navigating toward the coastline while monitoring updated radar returns and topographic charts showing land approach

entered.detail: coastal land area appearing on radar and navigation displays, visible as green terrain on updated chart
rocky shore features becoming visible on the port side radar returns

changed.from: displaying blue water chart with red hazard zones
changed.to: displaying green and yellow topographic land map showing coastline

changed.from: showing clear water with minimal contacts
changed.to: showing brown and orange land mass returns indicating coastline proximity

segments.scene_description: The vessel continues through the storm but now approaches a coastline visible on the updated navigation systems. The left monitor switches to a green topographic map showing land, while the radar displays solid returns from the approaching shore. The ship maintains steady progress toward the harbor entrance while the storm persists.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates from the chaos of the open ocean toward the safety of a rocky coastline. It begins with the vessel plowing through rough, stormy seas under a canopy of dark clouds, while navigation monitors track radar and depth readings. As a sudden flash of lightning illuminates the turbulent water, the camera maintains its forward gaze through the open sea. The scene then shifts as the vessel approaches land, signaled by the left monitor transitioning to a green topographic map and the radar displaying solid returns from the shore. Finally, the ship continues its steady progress through the persisting storm, closing the distance toward the harbor entrance.
